name: NorthGate Logistics Hub - USA
shortDescription: A high-capacity West Coast distribution hub specializing in fast-turnaround e-commerce fulfillment and regional freight consolidation.
description:
NorthGate Logistics Hub is a major West Coast distribution center positioned near Sacramento’s interstate corridors and air-cargo routes. The facility features automated conveyors, high-density pallet racking, and dedicated zones for parcel, LTL, and FTL processing. Climate-controlled storage, integrated WMS/OMS systems, and 24/7 dock operations support rapid order turnaround and seasonal scalability. Its proximity to ports and rail terminals enables efficient inbound container handling and multi-modal outbound routing across the western United States.

Working Hours (Pacific Time):
Mon-Fri: 06:00-22:00
Sat: 08:00-18:00
Sun: Closed
